caption: A group of men sit in rows of green chairs within a formal assembly setting. Several men wear white shirts, while others wear dark clothing, and some wear traditional caps in red, black, or grey. Many of the individuals are wearing light-colored face masks. Some of the green chairs feature white signs that read "DO NOT SIT." A news overlay appears at the bottom of the scene, featuring a purple bar with the text "NEWS NOW" and "JUSUN STRIKE" in large white letters, followed by the phrase "REPS URGE FG TO ENSURE SPEEDY RESOLUTION." The "plustv" logo appears on the right, and a call to "Subscribe www.youtube.com/plustvafrica" or "Watch us on DSTV CHANNEL 408" is visible. As the scene progresses, the camera angle shifts slightly, showing different individuals in the rows of seating, and a man in a dark jacket and mask looks down toward his lap.
